form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of five months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign second of 7 at Caulfield Heath Mdn-Sw November 12 over 1000m, soft track; 1.3 len behind Espana carrying 59.5kg at $11. When resuming last campaign fifth of 8 at Mornington Mdn-Sw October 23 over 1000m, soft track; 4.5 len behind Final Moment carrying 59.5kg at $2.80. Holds the key to the race.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last preparation fifth of 16 at Sunshine Coast 3yo Mdn November 28 over 1400m, soft track; 6 len behind Mishani Witness with 59.5kg at $4.60. On debut second of 12 at Gatton Mdn-Sw September 25 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Chilpur carrying 56kg at $7. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly, shifted out and bumped Lucky Artie. Raced wide throughout.

form.formComment: Most recently 3rd of 7 at Sunshine Coast 3yo C&G Mdn-Sw on March 13 over 1000m, on rain affected going; 4 len behind Youre Not The King with 56kg at $8.50. Before that 3rd of 9 at Ipswich 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 6 over 800m, on a slow track; 2 len behind Worthy with 56.5kg at $2.70. Racing well and is some chance despite taking on a better field.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly. Raced greenly under pressure in the home straight.
Raced greenly when placed under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 2nd of 7 at Sunshine Coast 3yo C&G Mdn-Sw on March 13 over 1000m, on a wet track; 4 len behind Youre Not The King carrying 58kg at $4.60. Previously second-up 3rd of 8 at Sunshine Coast Cg&E Mdn on November 9 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Lyneham with 57kg at $2.90. Back in good shape and is among the chances.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run got back early 3rd in a small field at this track Mdn-Sw on March 25 over 1000m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Rewrite with 56.5kg at $4.60. Before that 2nd of 9 at Doomben Mdn on March 11 over 1110m, on a slow track; 0.5 len behind Sky Dweller with 54kg at $8. Starting to run out of chances - each-way the best option.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Blundered on jumping away. Held up rounding the home turn until the 300m.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation sixth of 11 at Sale Mdn-Sw October 8 over 1427m, 3.5 len behind Blue Cowboy carrying 57.5kg at $5.50. Previously first up; seventh of 11 at Benalla Mdn-Sw September 2 over 1212m, soft track; 8 len behind The Narrator carrying 57.5kg at $7.50. SCRATCHED.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 900m, steadied lost ground when tightened for room by Bold Amore.

form.formComment: Third race start. Promising on debut raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 9 at Doomben 3yo Mdn-Sw on November 19 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Celtic Brave with 56kg at $13. Returned from break 2nd in a small field at this track Mdn-Sw on March 25 over 1000m, on a slow track; nose behind Rewrite with 55.5kg at $1.80. Beautifully drawn and with plenty of improvement in store looks tough to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping away. Raced wide for the majority.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last preparation seventh of 9 at Doomben 3yo Mdn-Sw November 19 over 1200m, 7 len behind Celtic Brave with 56kg at $101. When resuming last campaign sixth of 15 at Sunshine Coast 3yo F Mdn-Sw September 14 over 1000m, soft track; 3 len behind Spirit Of Barty carrying 58kg at $16. Will need this run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over raced near the 600m for a short distance. Bumped, near the 200m.
Approaching the winning post, making ground quickly, to be steadied.
Slow to begin and lost significant ground.
Held up approaching the home turn.
Very slow to begin. Raced keenly in the early stages.

form.formComment: First starter by Snitzel out of French Doll purchased for AUD $ 375,000 (Inglis 2024 Australian Easter Yearling Sale). Placed in a recent Doomben trial. Must respect the Gollan/Jones combination.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign second last of 7 at Canterbury 3yo F Mdn on November 14 over 1100m, 6 len behind Ernaux carrying 59kg at $6. First up last campaign ran last of 8 at Sandown-Hillside 2yo Hcp on July 30 over 1000m, slow going 10 len behind Express Class carrying 58kg at $8. Won a Grafton trial over 955m on March 30. Big chance first-up this time in easier company.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.
